pages.text: Spirit roots are generated randomly and can contain one or more elements.$(br2)Five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, earth.$(br)Special roots: thunder, ice, wind, light, dark.$(br)No root or pseudo root cultivates extremely slowly.
Root count changes cultivation speed.$(br)Single root: fastest.$(br)Two roots: good speed.$(br)Three or four roots: slower.$(br)Five roots: slowest, but most compatible with five-element techniques.
Spirit root grades from highest to lowest: Heaven, Earth, Mystic, Yellow.$(br2)Using a spell that matches one of your spirit root elements gives 2x damage or 2x duration, depending on the spell.
